member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Providers.BaseProviderSession
member.summary: Base class for provider sessions. Provides common metadata properties and a default implementation. Concrete provider sessions override and optionally and .

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Providers.BaseProviderSession.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,PSDataRepository.Providers.ProviderCapabilities)
member.summary: Initializes a new .

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Providers.BaseProviderSession.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Releases managed resources. Override in derived classes to dispose provider-specific resources.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Providers.IProviderDefinition
member.summary: Defines a data repository provider. Each provider assembly implements this interface to describe its capabilities, connect parameters, and how to create sessions. Discovered automatically at module load time via assembly scanning.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Providers.IProviderDefinition.Name
member.summary: Canonical provider name used in Connect-PSDataRepository -Provider. Must be unique across all loaded providers. Examples: "AzureBlob", "Disk", "Scp".

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Providers.IProviderDefinition.DisplayName
member.summary: Human-readable display name shown in help and diagnostics.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Providers.IProviderDefinition.Capabilities
member.summary: Describes what this provider can do (storage, queue, secrets, etc.).

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Providers.IProviderDefinition.SupportedAuthModes
member.summary: Authentication modes supported by this provider. Connect-PSDataRepository will only expose auth parameters applicable to this set. Use constants from or cloud-specific mode classes.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Providers.IProviderDefinition.GetConnectParameters
member.summary: Defines the dynamic parameters this provider needs for Connect-PSDataRepository.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Providers.IProviderDefinition.Connect(PSDataRepository.Abstractions.IConnectContext)
member.summary: Creates a provider session (repository instance) from the given connect context.
member.param: Contains resolved parameter values and authentication info.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Providers.IProviderRegistry
member.summary: Registry for discovered provider definitions. Core loads provider assemblies and registers them here. Cmdlets query the registry to find providers by name.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Providers.IProviderRegistry.Register(PSDataRepository.Providers.IProviderDefinition)
member.summary: Registers a provider definition.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Providers.IProviderRegistry.GetProvider(System.String)
member.summary: Gets a provider by its canonical name (case-insensitive).
member.returns: The provider definition, or null if not found.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Providers.IProviderRegistry.GetAll
member.summary: Gets all registered provider definitions.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Providers.IProviderRegistry.GetProviderNames
member.summary: Gets all registered provider names (for ValidateSet, tab completion).

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Providers.IProviderRegistry.Clear
member.summary: Removes all registered providers. Used during module reload/testing.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Providers.IProviderSession
member.summary: Represents an active provider session returned by . Wraps one or more repository instances and provides access to provider metadata.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Providers.IProviderSession.ProviderName
member.summary: Provider name that created this session.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Providers.IProviderSession.RepositoryIdentity
member.summary: Logical identity of the connected repository (account, path, host, etc.).

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Providers.IProviderSession.RepositoryNamespace
member.summary: Logical namespace (container, queue, vault, folder).

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Providers.IProviderSession.Capabilities
member.summary: Capabilities available in this session.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Providers.IProviderSession.GetRepository``1
member.summary: Gets the repository instance for the given capability interface. Returns null if the capability is not supported.

member.name: M:PSDataRepository.Providers.IProviderSession.TestConnectionAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Tests the connection to the underlying resource.
member.returns: True if the connection is healthy.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Providers.ProviderCapabilities
member.summary: Flags describing the capabilities a provider supports. Used by cmdlets to determine which operations are valid for a given session.

member.name: F:PSDataRepository.Providers.ProviderCapabilities.None
member.summary: No capabilities.

member.name: F:PSDataRepository.Providers.ProviderCapabilities.Storage
member.summary: Supports read/write/delete of named items (blobs, files).

member.name: F:PSDataRepository.Providers.ProviderCapabilities.Queue
member.summary: Supports message queue operations (send, receive, delete).

member.name: F:PSDataRepository.Providers.ProviderCapabilities.Secrets
member.summary: Supports secret storage operations (get, set, delete secrets).

member.name: F:PSDataRepository.Providers.ProviderCapabilities.Metadata
member.summary: Supports rich item metadata listing (size, timestamps, content type).

member.name: F:PSDataRepository.Providers.ProviderCapabilities.Filesystem
member.summary: Supports stream-based file system operations.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Providers.ProviderNames
member.summary: Canonical provider names used by built-in PSDataRepository plugins. Plugins and consumers should reference these constants instead of string literals to avoid typos and to enable IDE refactoring.

member.name: F:PSDataRepository.Providers.ProviderNames.InMemory
member.summary: In-memory queue provider (test/dev).

member.name: F:PSDataRepository.Providers.ProviderNames.Disk
member.summary: Local disk provider (filesystem).

member.name: F:PSDataRepository.Providers.ProviderNames.Scp
member.summary: SCP/SFTP provider.

member.name: F:PSDataRepository.Providers.ProviderNames.Ftp
member.summary: FTP/FTPS provider.

member.name: F:PSDataRepository.Providers.ProviderNames.AzureBlob
member.summary: Azure Blob Storage provider.

member.name: F:PSDataRepository.Providers.ProviderNames.AzureQueue
member.summary: Azure Storage Queue provider.

member.name: F:PSDataRepository.Providers.ProviderNames.AzureServiceBus
member.summary: Azure Service Bus provider.

member.name: F:PSDataRepository.Providers.ProviderNames.AzureKeyVault
member.summary: Azure Key Vault provider.

member.name: T:PSDataRepository.Providers.ProviderRegistry
member.summary: Default in-memory provider registry. Thread-safe for concurrent reads after initial registration.

member.name: P:PSDataRepository.Providers.ProviderRegistry.Instance
member.summary: Singleton instance shared across the module lifetime.
